name: Smokin' Hot Buffalo Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the chicken wings generously with salt and cayenne pepper.
2. Place the wings in the smoker preheated to 200 degrees Fahrenheit, using a mix of hickory and cherry wood chips.
3. Smoke for three hours until fully cooked through.
4. Remove the wings from the smoker and cut them into drumsticks and wing sections, discarding any wing tips.
5. In a saucepan, melt together the butter and hot sauce over low heat until warm.
6. Pour the sauce evenly over the smoked wings and serve immediately.
